programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: After witnessing a murder Jonathan hits his head and loses his memory As he tries to recover his memory he starts to suspect he may have had a mistress -- and killed her

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: A cop accidentally gets in the line of fire of a hit mans bullet and everyone at the 14th comes together to bring him in

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: While working a case Starsky learns that Hutchs new girlfriend Gillian is a high class prostitute working for some criminals theyre investigating

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: While visiting Hawkes old Vietnam buddy Greg Stewart Dominic Hawke become unwitting pawns in a potentially deadly custody battle between Gregs mother Martha June Allyson and ex-wife Rainey Rainey refuses to sign over custody of their infant son to Greg and Mrs Stewart holds Rainey hostage at their estate until the papers are signed Even worse the sinister Sheriff Waldren is on Mrs Stewarts payroll When a plane crash kills Greg Mrs Stewart realizes she will not be able to gain custody of her grandson and threatens Rainey The young mother hides her infant son with Dominic Hawke and Mrs Stewart orders Waldren to employ any means to get him back As Hawke tries to get Rainey out of the estate where she is being held captive Caitlin flies the Airwolf to Dominics hideout stops the crooked sheriff and his men from gaining custody Mrs Stewart and her co-conspirators are arrested by US Marshals after Waldren is killed taking on the Airwolf in a World War II fighter

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: An unscrupulous faith healer discovers a powerful glove that turns him into a killer

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: Broadway partners Vicky Lane and Dan Christy have a tiff over Christys womanizing Jealous Vicky takes up with her old flame and former dance partner Victor Price and Dans career takes a nosedive In hopes of rekindling their romance and getting Vicky back on the boards with him Dan follows her to a ritzy resort in the Canadian Rockies where she and Victor are about to open their new act But things get complicated when Dan wakes after a bender to find that hes hired an outlandish Latin secretary Rosita Murphy which makes Vicky think hes just up to his old tricks again

programme.title: The Hanging Tree
programme.desc: Joseph a doctor keeps dominating peoples lives He frees a robber Rune from getting hanged; and forces his charge on him too as compensation Things change when Elizabeth enters Josephs life

programme.title: Addams Family 116
programme.desc: Addams Family 116

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys expect company Kates pickle-brained ex-beau and his wife

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Theres a new game warden in town and his name is George MacMichael

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilber enters into a televised debate against a respected member of the community who wants to ban horses from the neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger wants to get out of having to take a trip to San Francisco with Kay and The Posts so he tricks Wilbur into believing that Mister Ed is suddenly going bald which in turn makes Ed a nervous wreck

programme.title: Riflamen 122
programme.desc: Riflamen 122

programme.title: Riflamen 116
programme.desc: Riflamen 116

programme.title: Gunsmoke S06E29 Stolen Horses
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S06E29 Stolen Horses

programme.title: Gunsmoke S04E06 Thoroughbreds
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S04E06 Thoroughbreds

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Bonanza

programme.title: West 324
programme.desc: West 324

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives break up a gambling ring Friday is undercover

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Working at a remote construction site Dr Kimble tries protect a coworker with a low IQ from being lynched when the caring married woman whos been teaching him to read is assaulted by an unknown attacker

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A high school track star haunted by the recent death of her Olympic-medalist mother is given her mothers magic crystal amulet which brings to life her secret ambitions and extracts vengeance upon those who cause her pain

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Farmer George is attracted to Mary Jo the nubile young woman who helps out with the chores The problem is shes in love with a scarecrow

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Young woman Suzy looks out of the window of her apartment and witnesses a man murdering a woman in the apartment directly across from hers Suzy is so traumatized by what she sees that shes rendered mute Suzy is placed in the care of Dr Trask who alas turns out to be the man who committed the murder she witnessed

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick comes face to face with the vampire LaCroix and kills him But the serial murders continue and get personal when it is discovered that one of the victims was a friend of Nicks

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan investigate the murder of a gym owner and realize that a mysterious pair of boxing gloves may be to blame

programme.title: Fright Night 2
programme.desc: Fright Night Part 2 is a sequel to link=tt0089175] Charley Brewster and the horror host Peter Vincent must face more vampires out for revenge

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy harasses a young medical student on Halloween night driving her to the brink of madness and beyond

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A smooth-talking criminal comes to the island and holds the women on the island hostage in exchange for ransom money but when he is captured they decide to try and reform him instead of holding him prisoner

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Troubles flow when Grampa and George think theyve struck oil on plots of land theyve recently agreed to trade to each other

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Granpa causes problems when he questions the way Kate disciplines the younger McCoys

programme.title: Smart 518
programme.desc: Smart 518

programme.title: Smart 511
programme.desc: Smart 511

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ befriends the Tiptons an elderly but feisty couple being forced out of their home and into a retirement community that is being used as a cover for an illegal skin flick operation

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol brings a French Poodle home from the pound and Mister Ed plans to get rid of Pierre as soon as possible

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur tries everything from hypnosis to psychiatry in order to cure Ed of his fear of heights

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants Klink to forget about a promotion so he plays cupid for him and General Burkhalters sister

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: There seems to be a traitor in the escaped prisoner pipeline and Hogan has to find him by following the escape route

programme.title: Mchale 328
programme.desc: Mchale 328

programme.title: Mchale 417
programme.desc: Mchale 417

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer makes friends with a hillbilly named Branch

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter and an old war buddy credit each other for being war heroes

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways start disappearing one by one and when the remaining castaways discover that headhunters have not taken them Gilligan begins to think hes a Dr Jeckyll and Mr Hyde and has killed them all

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Victor Durand once ran a bogus clinic before Dan sent him to prison Now Durand takes revenge by stealing a toxin infecting Dan with it and taunting him while Dan and his doctors frantically search for a cure to keep Dan alive

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The man who was painting Jennifers portrait dies supposedly while driving drunk but the Harts dont believe the official explanation

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick realizes hes been resting on his laurels as a writer when all of his attempts to get a book published under the pen name Dwight Schmidlapp are met with rejection

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: A new waitress at the Minuteman Cafe comes between Larry Darryl and Darryl Meanwhile George protests Michaels decision to cancel the television stations reruns of Barnaby Jones

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An ape man wreaks havoc on the island and frightens the castaways who dont realize that he is actually a Hollywood actor preparing for a role

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: A strange woman asks Mitch and Garner to help to seek out her daughter who has accidentally becomes the only witness to a murder Meanwhile Mitchs zen girlfriend Destiny has some complications throughout the night after her bag is switched at the LA airport and Ryan gets ripped off on ocean view property she plans to buy

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies with well-coordinated clothes and well-coordinated attacks Then Lyndah goes wild when a truck-driving debtor gets physical with Sonia And finally Matt and Froy face down a backwoods Texan with secret ammunition TV-14-LV

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy face incredible odds against a Texas-sized biker gang looking for a beat down and when bullets fly it starts to look like they may never come back home Back in LA Frankies wild antics jeopardize a repo and push Lyndah to her breaking point

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: A group of terrorists seize the Thunderblast top-secret super tank hiding it in Mexico The task of recovering it is entrusted to Frank McBain a former secret agent and current cop

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: A Japanese gallery owner denies his violent ninja heritage until American drug traffickers kidnap his young son

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hazzard Jail is the meeting place for Black Jack Bender and a group of syndicate kingpins who are conspiring to smuggle illegal weapons in the area Bo and Luke - with a little help from Uncle Jesse Daisy and their friends Cletus and Cooter - use some good ol southern smarts to keep the mobsters at bay until the FBI can arrive to investigate

programme.title: Hercules 107
programme.desc: Hercules 107

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zoor kidnaps a comatose policeman in order to use the mans body as a vessel in a consciousness transfer experiment that will allow him to test the human survival instinct and cause havoc on Earth

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians attempt to take over a military base that has been used as a secure storage area for much of the information regarding the 1953 invasion In particular they are seeking the location of Martians who are still in hibernation waiting to rejoin the invasion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane trades bodies with Swamp Thing after setting a trap using Will as bait

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane creates two cyborgs to hunt down the sole survivor of Dr Woodrues experiment

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The tall and imposing Magus arrives on board the ship He claims godlike powers namely that he effected the Creation But he is now disillusioned with the way that Life has progressed and wishes to start again He plans to mate Helena and Tony and Maya with Koenig But of course he is not God but a renegade cosmic sorcerer and quite illogical at that who needs to be controlled

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: The Dukes Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Rachels ex William Russ a riverboat gunman plans to leave their precocious 9 year old in her care

programme.title: Lonesome Dove OY 122
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove OY 122

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After being shot by robbers who were holding up a store a young police officer is treated by a doctor who was on the scene Unfortunately the officer later dies and the doctor becomes the only one who can identify the robbers But when Stone and Keller try to call him they find that he had to be using a phony name The man has been practicing using the name of several different doctors

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF agent Rollin Hand impersonating mobster Frank Wayne has a counter-proposal for the other mob bosses He says hell undergo plastic surgery to look like a different man In comes Cinnamon In reality she is undoing Rollins makeup; she can afford no mistakes because the other mob bosses are watching the entire time Meanwhile a doctor working for the IMF is performing plastic surgery on the real Wayne -- making him to look like Rollin All of this is part of Phelpss plan aimed at getting access to Waynes records But Phelps himself will face an attempted hit before the mission can be concluded

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a series of burglaries that are taking place during the day and the victims are those with a recent wedding or death in the family A senior citizen uses the paper to find homes that are empty during the day

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An ex-con who places an ad in a newspaper gets a reply referring to making a killing for 1000 He turns the reply over to Friday and Gannon who investigate the possibility that the replier is soliciting murder

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After three police officers are murdered Kimble David Janssen the new stranger in town becomes the obvious suspect His situation is complicated by his boss William Shatner a former cop who suffers from a mysterious psychiatric problem

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While returning to Stockton Victoria and Jarrod stop in a town with outrageous prices for food lodging and services After finding out the people are bilking travelers to survive the Barkleys decide to open a shipping business to save the town-despite opposition from a territorial boss with a rival freight company in the area

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is asked to lead a group of guardhouse prisoners on a mission to rescue two girls taken captive by the Kiowa He questions the odds or whether the girls will want to return The mission starts okay but his fears may be true

programme.title: I Come in Peace
programme.desc: A rebel police officer Jack Caines wants to bring an end to the drug trade and its top supplier Victor Manning Jack teams up with an FBI agent to launch an undercover operation to entrap Victor

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: The Scarlet and The Black

programme.desc: Action star Ramon Zamora stars in this action packed golden oldie A cruel twist of fate turns a peaceful man into a one man death force as he embarks on a violent vengeance trial

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: During the Simon Belmont Awards the Poltergeist King says that Trevor Belmont who is Simon Belmonts grandfather is a coward which makes Simon worried until him and Captain N get advice from a wizard

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After playing a riddle game Captain N Princess Lana and Simon get a call from Mayor Squaresly that Tetris is in trouble so they go and check it out while the Puzzle King plans to rule Tetris

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents sabotage a US space shuttle by planting a bomb on board Inspector Gadget foils MADs plans and saves the space shuttle Safety Tip Breakfast is the most important meal of the day

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: While on a trip in Africa Inspector Gadget Penny and Brain suspect that MAD agents are using wild animals to scare off villagers and set up a crime base in the jungle Inspector Gadget investigates the situation Safety Tip Be prepared when you go exploring
